accept: All 5 nits resolved or have explicit rationale for being declined.
Resolved nits do not regress the existing 'top 3 things that worked well' (good error messages on conflicting flags; act reopen smoothness; op-log audit terseness).
payload.description:
Catch-all for cosmetic findings from the 2026-05-10 UX eval. Each is small and orthogonal; bundle into one polish pass.

  1. Bare 'act' prints only 'usage: act <subcommand> [flags]'; should also list subcommands (or hint to 'act help').
  2. 'act help' final subcommand list ends 'dep add doctor import mcp' — 'dep add' looks like three separate items. Use commas or group multi-word subcommands.
  3. create --description '' is silently accepted; update --description '' clears (documented). Consistency note in --help.
  4. redact --help shows --value default duplicated: '--value "<redacted>" (default "<redacted>") (default "<redacted>")'.
  5. act init success message has no 'Next: ...' hint; CLAUDE.md fills the gap but a fresh agent in a non-act repo wouldn't see it.
payload.title: UX polish pass: nits from 2026-05-10 UX eval
